item.title: C'mon Feel the Noise! A Metalhead Dump
item.description:
Front Page Edit: thanks for all the accolades and upvotes! I'm doing my best to reply to everyone but I'm loving some of the new music recommendations. Bloodywood is high up on my priorities now
Wayne Static (RIP) is another guilty offender. The first minute or so of his song 'Static Killer' is just pornographic moaning
Metal is a huge genre, don't be a gatekeeping douchenoozle just because someone likes Nightwish which is symphonic. Or if someone still enjoys Nu Metal (guilty as charged)
These guys are pretty awesome. Definitely check out their new album Opal in Sky: Dream Shift
Luna Tax
item.dc:creator: DuncanHillsCoffee4Life

item.title: Depressing Saturday dump
item.description:
17734/36500 https://gofund.me/8b5802c4 Proud AF of his wife lol
She seems fun
When does a family become a clan?
She's a keeper
It took me a couple watches to catch it, honestly
I want to love on an elephant
Damn monkeys
He regretted once they found him lol
I miss my best friend. RIP Jaybird. Love you brother.
A great mother.
Hehehe
Adorable
They were synchronized
Dawwwwww
MOOD

item.dc:creator: BiNorwayBoy

item.title: I've lost 60 pounds in the last year. Last night I wrote a costume that I NEVER would have dared to put on before.
item.description:
215 pounds - obese, constantly in pain and short of breath, hiding my body in layers of loose-fitting clothes to try and disguise my shape. I was miserable and knew something had to change. I rarely allowed photos to be taken of myself because I hated looking at them. I actually don't have a picture of myself at my heaviest for this reason, but this selfie is close.
Flash forward to a year later! My husband insisted that he take this picture of me on our date last night. I objected as usual but he wasn't having it. "No. I want you to see yourself how I'm seeing you right now." Thanks, sweetheart. I had no idea how much I needed this.
item.dc:creator: torchit

item.title: AI shit is AI shit.
item.description: I couldn't give a fuck if it's Trump being pictured as a dog shit, Zelensky as captain Ukraine (isn't it TonyCrocktopus) or Putin, AI shit is AI shit. By upvoting it, you give them what they wants: attention and normalisation. Fuck generative AI, fuck their users and fuck whoever is fine with it.
item.dc:creator: BackToTheOriginalUsername

item.title: Leopards eating faces - March Update
item.description:
1. Maga in those states should be happy.
2. Failed the election vote performance.
3. Should have read the Project 2025 manifesto.
4. The prices are going to go up. Way up. He should be happy.
5. Sounds like racism? Kamala was an accomplished prosecutor and vp.
6. Sigh. Should have read project 2025.
7. Dangit. Bad enough dealing with flu and covid. I don't want more illnesses.
8. Moscow Mitch approves.
9. Should have read...nevermind.
10. 3 times stupid. Wow.
11. They got their "macho man". Should be happy.
12. I still can't believe he is a billionaire.
13. Something we can agree on.
14. Can this be true. I'm sorry if I'm getting folks hopes up.
item.dc:creator: MidlifecrisisDad

item.title: MRW I find out that my friend is moving back home to Canada after living in Texas for a year and a half.
item.description: Maybe it was because of that guy that killed a cop outside her workplace then hurt a K9 and then he finally got gunned down at the back door of her workplace. That was a lot for a Canadian.
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: Well, that explains… so much
item.description: MVE(yeah you know me): r/totallyrealtweets should have tipped many of you off that this is indeed a totally real tweet. And because I know many of us don’t know how to sarcasm… /s Always. Scrutinize. Everything. You. Read. Online.
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: Thanks dudes.
item.description: For real though. Lounged around, played Atomfall, ate takeout (not sushi. Couldn't find a sushi delivery, can you believe that?). Today, got up, did laundry, dishes, made pulled pork (it's on hour 8 of 16), and went for a five mile jog/walk. Thanks again for the kind words. Y'all are the best. Except for you, you know who tiny octopus is talking to. No, not you, them. Behind the other dude. Yeah...sheesh. That dude.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
TheFreePizzaDude here and today we're hoping to send out the 1,000th grocery order of this project! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
The has been amazing for us to help as many people as possible and we can't thank you enough https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
My foster Sam is here to show you how it works for requests!
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
That's 15,169 meals since we started 996 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 400 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 450 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 505 8th, 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 525 12th and 13th by Pizza Angel @meisa1291 530 14th, 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 535 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd by @OP 536 Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @sesamesnapsinhalf 630 25th, 26th, 27th and 28th by @OP 730 29th by Pizza Angel @littlespitfire24 800 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck ... Today's Grocery Tally 220 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 230 2nd by @OP 235 3rd by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 255 THE 1,000TH GROCERY ORDER OF THIS PROJECT SENT OUT BY GROCERY ANGEL @TheCraicen 315 5th by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 329 6th by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 415 7th by Grocery Angel @Brrrrrrrt ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 31 meals Filled 7 huge grocery orders That's 15,200 meals since we started 1,003 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, 1,000 grocery orders!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Hundrets of Thousands are demonstrating.
item.description: Hello USA, this is what a demonstration against a dictator looks like, not just Luigi memes. Hundreds of thousands gathered on the streets of Istanbul this Saturday during protests in Turkey. The CHP is even talking about 2.2 million demonstrators. They are demanding İmamoğlu's release and the resignation of the Erdoğan government.
item.dc:creator: truemdgeist1337
